title: McCarthy Tétrault Launches Spotlight Can-Asia
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Launches Spotlight Can-Asia
January 16, 2020 — McCarthy Tétrault has launched its first international blog, Spotlight Can-Asia . Leveraging the firm’s region specific transactional experience, and business and cultural expertise, Spotlight Can-Asia delivers timely insights and commentary on developments in Canadian law relevant for businesses across Asia which have ties to or interests in the Canadian market.
Spotlight Can-Asia is for businesses looking to make investments or expand their activities in North America, and for Canadian businesses looking to invest or expand in Asia. It aims to help readers stay ahead of the curve to effectively capitalize on the opportunities arising from cross-border exchanges between Asia and Canada (and North America).
“Critical and swift developments, such as US-China trade wars, policy easing and a range of other political and economic developments influence investment decisions and opportunities into and from Asia,” said Joyce Lee, Partner and Co-chair of McCarthy Tétrault’s Asia Practice. “Within this dynamic market, it is critical for our clients to have a timely and thorough understanding of the ever shifting geopolitical, economic and legal landscapes in Asia and Canada.”
Understanding the market will enhance our clients’ abilities to assess, prepare for and respond promptly to resulting impacts and changes to their industry and business, and thereby better execute their strategies and achieve their business goals.
Published in English and Chinese, Spotlight Can-Asia covers a range of areas, including:
- Foreign investment and merger regulation
- International trade and investment
- Corporate finance transactions
- Mergers and acquisitions
- Transactions involving publicly-listed companies
- Business immigration
We invite you to subscribe to Spotlight Can-Asia here .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact
麦启泰律师事务所（McCarthy Tétrault）推出了第一档国际博客 - 《 加亚聚光灯博客 》 。《亚洲博客》系利用本所多年积累的亚洲地区交易经验、商业和文化专业知识，向读者及时提供有关加拿大市场与亚洲企业相关的加拿大法律发展的最新见解和评论。
《 加亚聚光灯博客 》 针对希望在北美进行投资或扩展业务的企业，以及希望在亚洲进行投资或扩展其业务的加拿大企业，提供参考。其宗旨系帮助读者能够始终提前知晓市场动态，从而有效利用亚洲和加拿大（以及北美）之间跨境交流带来的机会。
麦启泰律师事务所合伙人兼亚洲业务组主席李欣恩（Joyce Lee）说：“基于全球各种政治和经济深化的发展，诸如中美贸易战、政策放松以及一系列其他重大而迅速的发展状态都会影响着进出亚洲的投资决策和机会。”而且，“在这个充满活力的市场中，我们的客户必须及时、彻底地了解亚洲和加拿大不断变化的地缘政治、经济和法律格局。”
了解市场会增强我们的客户对评估、准备和及时应对其行业和业务影响和变化的能力，从而更好地实施它们的战略计划并实现他们的业务目标。
《 加亚聚光灯博客 》 以英文和中文出版，并涵盖多个领域内容，包括：
我们欢迎您订阅 《 加亚聚光灯博客 》 点击这里 。
麦启泰律师事务所竭诚为加拿大和国际各种大型和复杂业务提供综合广泛的法律服务。该律师事务所在加拿大的各主要商业中心、美国纽约市和英国伦敦市均设有分支机构。
该律所以法律实践和提供创新客户服务的综合方法为基础，以其法律人才、行业洞察力和实践经验帮助客户实现对他们重要的成果。
